title: African Development Bank meets as aid shrinks
caption: The bank looks to Africa's own resources to close a 400 billion dollar yearly financing gap.

title: Brazil moves to tighten race checks for election quotas
caption: A new proposal would require candidates to self declare their race to stop fraud in racial quotas.

title: Directory launched for Windrush compensation claims
caption: The Black Equity Organisation builds a guide to help scandal victims reach legal advice and redress.
